description: Lock this batch of contextual edge removals so broad neighboring practices do not return as direct prerequisites.

checks.reason: Military field care is not the mechanism for Listerian antiseptic and aseptic surgery.
Early statutory factory safety regulation should not require labor-union collective bargaining.
Charitable hospitals are religious and civic care institutions rather than battlefield medical systems.
University medical faculties are learned institutions rather than field-medicine logistics.
Concentric castles are layered fortifications, not a direct Gothic architecture derivative.
Ticketing systems depend on paid admission and venue commerce, not stage machinery.
Anatomical study should not directly require therapeutic plant practice.
Trepanation is surgical context rather than the direct basis for Alexandrian anatomy.
Dyed textiles require a textile substrate but not a specific spindle technology.
Broad proto-chemistry should not be a direct prerequisite for dyed textile production.
The source-backed material-transformation anchor is pigment processing, not herbal medicine.
Fermentation is a parallel transformation practice, not the source-backed material-processing anchor.
